benefits.description: Described the peptide as 'so miraculous when it's working' and a 'fantastic peptide'

side_effects.description: Welt at injection site and body hives on first cycle; small welt at injection site on subsequent cycles

Anaphylactic shock: intense pressure and inflammation in lymph nodes of neck spreading to whole body, loss of consciousness, vomiting, near-defecation, multiple blackouts, full body pain, waves of inflammation

protocol_notes: First cycle approximately 5 months, stopped due to body hives and joint inflammation. Resumed with very small dose and worked up gradually. Second cycle ~3 months at 3-5x per week before anaphylactic event. Dose was 0.05ml of a 5mg/5mg CJC/IPA vial diluted with 3ml BAC water, calculated to be ~83mcg total. OP injected before bed and experienced anaphylaxis within minutes, passed out, vomited while unconscious, experienced multiple blackouts. Plans to discontinue and possibly switch to low-dose HGH.
